title: DeHub Takeover
html:
<h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-4 font-exo">Time for a Takeover</h2> <p class="mb-4 text-lg text-royal-blue/80">In today's attention economy, it comes as no surprise that memes have captured so much of the market's attention and liquidity so far this cycle, with communities further establishing themselves as the driving force and catalysts behind much of the success witnessed so far across this sector.</p> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">Some could argue, fairly, that we've been too focussed on building and innovating, while not meeting some expectations when it comes to the community growth aspects. Well this is about to change, and timed nicely with the release of the dehub.io app upgrade.</p>

<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mt-8 mb-4 font-exo">Turbocharging The DeHub Army</h3> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">We're about to turbocharge The DeHub Army with:</p> <ul class="list-disc list-inside space-y-3 mb-4 text-royal-blue/80 pl-4"> <li>Token gated group chats for all holders, and those with over 10,000,000 $DHB (Great White Shark badge holders in-app). This will be a place where more detailed plans can be discussed in private/unofficial settings, while larger investors can strategise further synergetic opportunities.</li> <li>Daily Town Halls with 24/7 voice chat and raiding across all socials by community members and paid shills.</li> <li>Daily engagement farming posts with regular technical updates.</li> <li>Volume driving initiatives for trending with new 0% tax on Base.</li> <li>Large promoter network and increased targeted ads on X, Instagram, Google and YouTube.</li> </ul> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">This is all being prepared to kick-start as soon as our next app upgrade is released, to align with our other campaigns for creators joining the app. As more eyes lay upon DeHub, we need there to be a more vibrant community, growing volume and engagement which all this should achieve, so that we all reap the full rewards and marketing ROI (return on investment).</p> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">Along with the founders at Town Hall daily, a team is being prepared to manage the voice chat, conduct raids across socials as well as regular posts on the official X account 24/7, however for this to really work it will require more support. We need community leaders and members to step up and take on roles after we lay the new system foundations so we're keen to hear from any mods, voice chat operators, shills, raiders or any technical hands already in the community, as you know the project best and can articulate the message.</p>

<p class="mt-8 font-semibold text-royal-blue">Furthermore, we will be kick-starting these campaigns with the private token gated groups launching this weekend, in preparation for the app upgrade. So stay tuned for more information and reach out to any of the team or hr@dehub.net for hiring opportunities as it's all kicking off soon here.</p>
